label: Merge
description: Combine results from multiple incoming branches into a single output using array, object, or concat strategy.

settings.name: mergeStrategy
settings.label: Strategy
settings.description: How to combine incoming values. object=labeled by source node, array=indexed list, concat=flatten arrays.

ai.shortDescription: Combine results from multiple parallel branches.
ai.whenToUse: After a condition or parallel node fans out to multiple branches — merge gathers all results back into a single value before continuing.
ai.examplePrompt: merge the results from both enrichment branches
ai.promptHints: Use strategy=object to get { branch1: ..., branch2: ... } (safest for differently-shaped inputs). Use strategy=array for uniform inputs. Use strategy=concat only when all inputs are arrays.

outputAssertions.name: merged_not_null
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Merge node returned null — check that at least one upstream branch produced output.
